concepts: negative-funding pullback continuation after failed breakdown

next_cycle_focus: Do not spend another cycle refining the current TAO / 4h batch. All three branches failed the walk-forward trade-count requirement with zero trades, so the next exploration turn should rotate toward a materially denser supported lane or a simpler always-on state framework rather than tweaking these TAO concepts.
rationale: Cycle 122 is now closed and explicitly abandoned. All three current-cycle TAO / 4h branches produced zero trades in both insample and out-of-sample walk-forward testing and failed with low-trade-count flags, despite being intentionally looser than the prior batches. That means the failure is not just over-confirmation inside one branch; it is a stronger warning that the current exploration template is still too sparse to produce evaluable signals.
